purpose: Bind the fresh OPL Temporal production-residency probe, actual managed-worker restart readback, and the remaining RCA visual-stage long-soak blockers without upgrading provider transport evidence into domain or production readiness.
machine_boundary: This closeout records exact external runtime refs and fail-closed blockers. It does not track Temporal lifecycle truth in the repo, create OPL stage attempts, create a domain owner receipt, write visual truth or artifact bodies, authorize review/export, or declare RCA production visual-stage long-soak complete.

runtime_probe.executed_command: OPL_TEMPORAL_CLIENT_RPC_TIMEOUT_MS=600000 opl family-runtime residency proof --provider temporal --production --json

runner_findings.observed_error: spawn codex ENOENT because /tmp/opl-temporal-production-residency-proof did not exist
runner_findings.required_owner_fix: The OPL residency proof must materialize or validate its declared workspace before starting CodexStageActivity.

runner_findings.observed_error: Failed to get Workflow execution history while the activity remained healthy and later completed
runner_findings.required_owner_fix: The production proof must use a result wait budget compatible with the declared 3900 second activity window or poll terminal state without abandoning a healthy workflow.

typed_blockers.owner: one-person-lab/OPL Runway and Codex CLI provider configuration
typed_blockers.legal_entry: OPL_TEMPORAL_CLIENT_RPC_TIMEOUT_MS=600000 opl family-runtime residency proof --provider temporal --production --json
typed_blockers.expected_output: A fresh 9/9 OPL production capability receipt with a completed typed-closeout attempt and an observed retry/dead-letter boundary.
typed_blockers.verification: Read the exact persisted proof SHA, both Temporal workflow histories, managed-worker PID change, and post-restart history requery.
typed_blockers.stop_condition: worker_completed_attempt, typed_closeout_required_for_completed, and retry_or_dead_letter_boundary_observed are all true on the same fresh proof.

typed_blockers.legal_entry: OPL Temporal StageRun into the RCA domain handler, followed by RCA emit_temporal_controlled_visual_stage_long_soak_evidence with refs from the same visual-stage run.
typed_blockers.expected_output: Repeated real RCA visual-stage route attempts with artifact locators, review/export acceptance, retry/dead-letter/requery/resume refs, independent AI execution and quality refs, forbidden-write proof, and an RCA domain owner receipt or stable typed blocker.
typed_blockers.verification: Query Temporal history and OPL attempt ledger, then validate the RCA runtime evidence instance and owner/review/export refs against the exact artifact-producing run.
typed_blockers.stop_condition: A fresh same-run RCA long-soak evidence ref and runtime locator are visible, owner acceptance is valid, and no provider-only completion is used as domain completion.
